verification_note: Model IDs and pricing verified 2026-05-15. /model-audit re-verifies monthly. Verify live before any cost-sensitive operation.

codex.invocation: local Codex CLI — `codex exec` (general) / `codex exec review` (code review)
codex.auth: ~/.codex/auth.json (Codex CLI login — NOT a Keychain item)
codex.underlying_model: gpt-5.5 (OpenAI GPT-5.5 family, accessed via Codex)
codex.pricing_note: the maintainered via the Codex CLI account, not the stack's API metering. Codex calls are not metered into cost_log.
codex.notes: v1.1.1 adaptation: the stack reaches the OpenAI / GPT-5.5 family through the locally-installed, authenticated Codex CLI rather than a direct OpenAI API key. Claude Code cannot run subagents on non-Claude models, so adversarial roles (reviewer, product-critic, security-auditor) run on a Claude model and orchestrate Codex via bash. Replaces the artifacts' `openai` provider block. See ADR-011.

gemini-2.5-pro.notes: Gemini 3.1 Pro (2M context) is available — consider migration in next /model-audit. Tier 3 provider; no Google key configured as of 2026-05-16.

reviewer.notes: v1.1.1: adversarial review via local Codex CLI — see ADR-011.

product-critic.notes: v1.1.1: product critique via local Codex CLI — see ADR-011.

red-team.notes: Tier 3 provider. Same Claude-Code-cannot-run-non-Claude-subagents issue as the Codex roles; Gemini integration unresolved as of Tier 2 — to be addressed in Session 5 (Tier 3).

security-auditor.notes: v1.1.1: primary audit via local Codex CLI; belt-and-suspenders Opus second pass on novel crypto/auth — see ADR-011.

foreman-team-lead.notes: v1.1: Used in agent-teams orchestration mode only. Main-thread mode uses foreman as a skill — no subagent invocation.

notes: v1.1.1 change: OpenAI/GPT-5.5-family work routes through the local Codex CLI (provider `codex`), not a direct OpenAI API key. reviewer, product-critic, security-auditor run on a Claude model and orchestrate Codex. See ADR-011.
v1.1 change: Foreman is a skill (skills/foreman/SKILL.md) in main-thread orchestration mode. Only in agent-teams mode is foreman a separate session (team-lead role).

Pricing verified against vendor docs on 2026-05-15. Anthropic: platform.claude.com. Google: ai.google.dev. Apr 2026 friction was a 3.4x cost underforecast — verify live before any cost-sensitive operation.
/model-audit skill (Tier 4) re-verifies monthly and proposes changes.
red-team and architecture-critic and historian use Gemini 2.5 Pro. No Google key is configured as of 2026-05-16; Gemini integration is a Tier 3 (Session 5) decision.
Gemini 3.1 Pro (2M context, released Feb 2026) is a migration candidate for architecture-critic, historian. Flagged for next /model-audit.
